name: hedgehog-mode-anywhere
description: Add an adorable animated hedgehog buddy to any website, powered by PostHog's hedgehog-mode engine.
comment: Requires @posthog/hedgehog-mode >=0.0.53 because that release externalizes pixi.js (PostHog/hedgehog-mode#30); the inlined-pixi builds (<=0.0.52) can't be patched for the eval/worker CSP limits of MV3 content scripts. pixi.js is a direct dep because content.jsx imports pixi.js/unsafe-eval and loadTextures.
